intro: Gymnanthocereus amstutziae, also known as Amstutz's pitaya or pitaya amstutzia, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain, inflammation, and oxidative stress.
